headline: New Investors: 3 Rock-Solid Stocks to Build Your Portfolio Around
summary: Visa, Home Depot, and Abbott Laboratories are blue chip stocks that can provide your portfolio with a good mix of safety, stability, and dividend income over the long term.

headline: Abbott (ABT) Secures CE Mark for World’s First Dual Glucose‑Ketone Sensing Technology for Diabetes
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) is one of the best healthcare stocks to buy with highest upside potential. Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) announced on May 27 that it has secured CE Mark for the world’s first dual glucose‑ketone sensing technology for people with diabetes. headline: Chemiluminescence Immunoassay Market by Product, Technology, Sample Type, Application, End User - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The chemiluminescence immunoassay (CLIA) market is expected to grow from USD 11.58 billion in 2026 to USD 16.39 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 7.2%. Key drivers include the rising demand for accurate diagnostic tests for chronic and infectious diseases like cancer and cardiovascular disorders, along with automation and high-throughput testing advancements. headline: 143 investors said no to his wearable idea, he says—now Whoop is worth $10.1 billion
summary: Will Ahmed founded Whoop at age 22 while he was at Harvard University, with early prototypes developed out of the Harvard Innovation Labs. He was rejected by 143 investors, came within a week of bankruptcy and built a company now valued at $10.1 billion with 2.7 million members across more than 200 countries, he says.
